temporal_description:
A high-angle, wide shot reveals a vast, dark, and cluttered room. The space is filled with a chaotic jumble of furniture, including chairs, tables, and other objects piled high and scattered across the floor. The lighting is dim and greenish, casting deep shadows and creating a sense of disarray and mystery. In the upper right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a loud, chaotic, and metallic crashing sound, as if a large quantity of objects are being violently thrown and tumbling over each other in a large, resonant space.

The camera cuts to a close-up of a young man with round glasses and a look of pure terror. His eyes are wide, and his mouth is open in a gasp. He is wearing a light-colored jacket over a blue shirt. The background is dark and indistinct, keeping the focus entirely on his frightened expression. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.

The camera pulls back to a medium shot, showing the young man from the waist up. He is now running through the dark, cluttered room, which is revealed to be a vast, dimly lit attic or storage space. The room is filled with an overwhelming number of objects, including framed pictures leaning against walls and piles of furniture. The young man runs away from the camera, deeper into the chaotic environment. A male voice then lets out a high-pitched, panicked scream, filled with terror and urgency. The scream echoes slightly, suggesting he is in a large, open room. The "风行网" watermark is still present.

The camera angle shifts to a low-angle, wide shot from the floor, looking up at the young man as he continues to run away. The sheer volume of the cluttered space is emphasized, with piles of chairs, frames, and other items filling the frame. The young man is a small figure in the center of this vast, dark chaos. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner. The shot is shaky, following the character's movement through the disarray. Immediately following the scream, another male voice yells aggressively and with intense anger, "You dare hit my girlfriend, you idiot!" His tone is a furious and protective shout, full of rage and determination.
